title: ollama/ollama
summary: Get up and running with Llama 3.3, DeepSeek-R1, Phi-4, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama, enabling easy integration of local LLMs into Python applications.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama, supporting Node.js and browser environments.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama models, providing LLM, embeddings, and tool-calling components.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web interface for Ollama, featuring model management and multi-user support.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java client library for Ollama, supporting synchronous and asynchronous operations.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community-maintained Ruby gem for interacting with the Ollama API.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into the editor as a GitHub Copilot alternative.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Enhanced interactive CLI wrapper around Ollama with conversation history and prompt templates.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes clusters with GPU support.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake packaging Ollama and popular models for reproducible deployments.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker images for Ollama with CUDA and ROCm variants.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG implementation using Ollama for embeddings and generation, built with ChromaDB.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models via slash commands.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot integration for Ollama, supporting threaded conversations and app mentions.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module for CI/CD pipelines that need to spin up Ollama models for testing or generation tasks.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaEmbedder components for NLP pipelines.

title: ollama-fastapi
summary: FastAPI service exposing Ollama endpoints with OpenAI-compatible chat completions format.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds AI autocomplete and summarization using local Ollama models.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Unofficial Rust crate for interacting with the Ollama HTTP API, featuring async/tokio support.
